name: RPlog_An_Unscrupulous_Undertaking_Complications
title: An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Complications
summary: On Nar Shaddaa, the saboteur posing as Alastar Tritarian seeks out the Hutt-aligned Falleen crime lord Nasiri to broker a bounty that must carry no ties to his employer's company. Alastar lays out the target and a credit chit, but Nasiri claims not to recognize the name and grows wary of the unusual secrecy and the scale of what is being asked. Alastar presses, reminding the Falleen that he has dealt with the Hutt organization before and knows its bounties span the galaxy in varying legality, a remark Nasiri brushes off by noting that laws mean nothing on Nar Shaddaa. As Alastar's blunt, condescending manner -- treating the lord as a fool to be exploited -- gives offense, the tone curdles. Nasiri, insulted, tosses the chit back and calls the deal off, telling Alastar to keep his credits and his profits before turning back to the festivities.
